title: iPhone 18 Pro Rumors Are Everywhere. Here's What Actually Looks Legit
summary: Flagship phones, such as the iPhone 18 Pro, 18 Pro Max, and the first-ever foldable iPhone , could be unveiled in September, while the base iPhone 18, iPhone Air 2, and the iPhone 18e could be launched in spring 2027.
